name: getFlagShowNomenclature
description: Returns whether planetary surface nomenclature labels are displayed.
returnDescription: true if nomenclature labels are visible

name: setFlagShowNomenclature
description: Shows or hides planetary surface nomenclature labels.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show nomenclature labels, false to hide

example: NomenclatureMgr.setFlagShowNomenclature(true);

name: flagShowNomenclature
description: Property that controls whether nomenclature labels are displayed.
example:
var visible = core.getStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.flagShowNomenclature');
core.setStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.flagShowNomenclature', true);

name: getFlagShowTerminatorZoneOnly
description: Returns whether nomenclature labels are displayed only near the terminator (day/night boundary) rather than across the entire planetary disk.
returnDescription: true if only terminator zone labels are shown

name: setFlagShowTerminatorZoneOnly
description: Sets whether nomenclature labels should be shown only near the terminator zone (day/night boundary). This helps reduce visual clutter on the illuminated side.

parameters.name: onlyTerminator
parameters.description: true to show only terminator zone labels, false to show all

name: flagShowTerminatorZoneOnly
description: Property that controls whether nomenclature labels are shown only near the terminator zone.
returnDescription: true if only terminator zone labels are shown
example: var terminatorOnly = core.getStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.flagShowTerminatorZoneOnly');

name: getTerminatorMinAltitude
description: Returns the minimum solar altitude angle (in degrees) for displaying nomenclature labels near the terminator. Features with solar altitude below this value are hidden. Default: -2°.
returnDescription: Minimum solar altitude in degrees (-90 to 90)
example:
var minAlt = NomenclatureMgr.getTerminatorMinAltitude();
core.debug("Terminator min altitude: " + minAlt + "°");

name: setTerminatorMinAltitude
description: Sets the minimum solar altitude angle for displaying nomenclature labels near the terminator.

parameters.name: degrees
parameters.description: Minimum solar altitude in degrees (-90 to 90)

name: terminatorMinAltitude
description: Property that controls the minimum solar altitude for terminator zone display.
example: core.setStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.terminatorMinAltitude', -5);

name: getTerminatorMaxAltitude
description: Returns the maximum solar altitude angle (in degrees) for displaying nomenclature labels near the terminator. Features with solar altitude above this value are hidden. Default: 40°.
returnDescription: Maximum solar altitude in degrees (-90 to 90)
example:
var maxAlt = NomenclatureMgr.getTerminatorMaxAltitude();
core.debug("Terminator max altitude: " + maxAlt + "°");

name: setTerminatorMaxAltitude
description: Sets the maximum solar altitude angle for displaying nomenclature labels near the terminator.

parameters.name: degrees
parameters.description: Maximum solar altitude in degrees (-90 to 90)

example: NomenclatureMgr.setTerminatorMaxAltitude(45);

name: terminatorMaxAltitude
description: Property that controls the maximum solar altitude for terminator zone display.
example: core.setStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.terminatorMaxAltitude', 45);

name: getFlagOutlineCraters
description: Returns whether craters and satellite features are outlined as ellipses on the planetary surface.
returnDescription: true if crater outlines are drawn, false otherwise

name: setFlagOutlineCraters
description: Sets whether craters and satellite features should be outlined as ellipses on the planetary surface, making them easier to identify.

parameters.name: outline
parameters.description: true to draw crater outlines, false to hide

name: flagOutlineCraters
description: Property that controls whether craters are outlined as ellipses on planetary surfaces.
returnDescription: true if crater outlines are drawn
example: core.setStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.flagOutlineCraters', true);

name: getFlagHideLocalNomenclature
description: Returns whether nomenclature labels are hidden on the celestial body the observer is currently located on (e.g., hiding Earth features when on Earth).
returnDescription: true if local nomenclature is hidden, false if shown

name: setFlagHideLocalNomenclature
description: Sets whether nomenclature labels should be hidden on the celestial body the observer is currently located on.

parameters.name: hide
parameters.description: true to hide local nomenclature, false to show

name: flagHideLocalNomenclature
description: Property that controls whether nomenclature labels on the observer's current celestial body are hidden.
returnDescription: true if local nomenclature is hidden
example: core.setStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.flagHideLocalNomenclature', true);

name: getFlagShowSpecialNomenclatureOnly
description: Returns whether only special nomenclature points (poles, east point, west point, center, subsolar point) are displayed instead of all surface features.
returnDescription: true if only special points are shown, false if all features are shown

name: setFlagShowSpecialNomenclatureOnly
description: Sets whether only special nomenclature points (poles, east/west point, center, subsolar point) should be displayed.

parameters.name: onlySpecial
parameters.description: true to show only special points, false to show all features

name: specialNomenclatureOnlyDisplayed
description: Property that controls whether only special nomenclature points are displayed.
returnDescription: true if only special points are shown
example: var onlySpecial = core.getStelProperty('NomenclatureMgr.specialNomenclatureOnlyDisplayed');

name: getColor
description: ⚠️ Returns the current color of nomenclature labels. Returns a Vec3f that cannot be directly indexed. Use the property instead for reading.

name: setColor
description: Sets the color of planetary surface nomenclature labels.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector created via core.vec3f(r, g, b)

name: nomenclatureColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the nomenclature label color as a string. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use NomenclatureMgr.setColor().

name: updateI18n
description: Updates the translations of all nomenclature item names based on the current UI language. Called automatically when language changes.

name: searchByEnglishName
description: Searches for a planetary surface feature by its English name.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the surface feature

returnDescription: Nomenclature item object, or null if not found

name: getName
description: Returns the display name of the Nomenclature Manager module.
returnDescription: Module name ('Geological features' or similar translated)
example:
var name = NomenclatureMgr.getName();
core.debug("Module: " + name);

name: getStelObjectType
description: Returns the object type identifier for nomenclature items. Used by StelObjectMgr to identify objects from this module.
example:
var objType = NomenclatureMgr.getStelObjectType();
core.debug("Object type: " + objType); // Returns 'NomenclatureItem'
